notes: CARE-KV base_quant prefill, INT3, group_size=32. No residual correction.

k_quant_scheme: per-channel (scale across tokens), INT3 symmetric, PRE-RoPE storage
notes: KVQuant-style same-condition reimplementation. Per-channel K INT3 (pre_rope) + per-token V INT3. Dense uniform quant only — NUQ and dense+sparse outlier handling NOT included. NOT the official KVQuant CUDA repo (SqueezeAILab/KVQuant); calibration-free.

k_quant_scheme: per-channel (KVQuant post-RoPE variant, scale across tokens), INT3 + CARE-KV residual slots
v_quant_scheme: per-token  (KVQuant post-RoPE variant, scale across channels), INT3 + CARE-KV residual slots
notes: KVQuant-style base quant (TRUE pre-RoPE: K quantized before RoPE on the smoother unrotated per-channel distribution, then K_hat re-rotated so the CARE-KV residual is computed post-RoPE; per-channel K + per-token V), INT3K / INT3V, same-condition reimpl + CARE-KV residual correction (carekv_stored, joint+normalize, cached, SK=2 SV=4 RK=2 RV=2). K_hat/V_hat held in fp16 side-buffer in this prototype; memory accounting reports the base scheme's theoretical bits.

v_quant_scheme: per-token  (KIVI, scale across channels), INT3 + CARE-KV residual slots

K_hat/V_hat held in fp16 side-buffer in this prototype; memory accounting reports the base scheme's theoretical bits.
